tools.name: get_quote
tools.description:
Fetch real-time van insurance quotes. ALWAYS collect ALL of the following from the user before calling.
When asking questions, use your judgement on flow — you may ask several related questions together or one at a time, whatever feels most natural and least overwhelming for the user.

Required fields:
1. postcode – full UK postcode (e.g. DH1 4QP)
2. ncb – No-Claims Bonus years (0–9, or '9+' = 9)
3. age – driver age
4. vehicleValue – vehicle value in £
5. kept – where the van is kept overnight: Driveway, Garage, or Road
6. cover – Comp (Comprehensive), TPFT (Third Party Fire & Theft), or TPO (Third Party Only)
7. claims – number of claims in the last 5 years (0–3, where 3 means 3 or more)
8. convictions – number of motoring convictions (0–3)
9. usage – Social, Business, or Hire and Reward
10. mileage – estimated annual mileage
